nodes.name: Sunday 9AM IST
nodes.notes: Fires every Sunday at 09:00 IST. Workflow timezone is Asia/Kolkata (see Settings). Day-of-week 0 = Sunday in standard cron.

nodes.name: Fetch Weekly Summaries
nodes.notes: GET /api/analytics/weekly-summary (internal auth, tier_2+ orgs only). Returns { summaries: [...], meta }. Each summary has: organization_id, owner_phone, language_preference, week_range, order_count, order_value_formatted, production_summary, collections_formatted, rupees_saved, top_customer. The endpoint drops orgs with no data or no owner phone.

nodes.name: Split Into Summaries
nodes.notes: Fans the summaries array to one item per org. This is the last 1:1 node; downstream nodes reference it by name for item-stable lineage.

nodes.name: Has Data
nodes.notes: Defense-in-depth guard: has_data true, owner phone present, language set. The API already enforces all three; this catches contract drift.

nodes.name: Send Weekly Summary

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.owner_phone, type: 'template', orgId: $json.organization_id, template: { name: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'weekly_business_summary_gujarati' : 'weekly_business_summary', language: { code: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'gu' : 'en' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [{ type: 'text', text: String($json.week_range) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.order_count) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.order_value_formatted) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.production_summary) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.collections_formatted) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.rupees_saved) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.top_customer) }] }] } }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/whatsapp/send (internal auth) → Meta Cloud API. Sends weekly_business_summary template (Utility, 7 body variables) to the org owner — NEVER to a customer chat (Rule A). Variables: {{1}}=week_range, {{2}}=order_count, {{3}}=order_value_formatted, {{4}}=production_summary, {{5}}=collections_formatted, {{6}}=rupees_saved, {{7}}=top_customer. Gujarati variant: weekly_business_summary_gujarati.

nodes.name: Log Summary Sent

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Split Into Summaries').item.json.organization_id, chatPhone: $('Split Into Summaries').item.json.owner_phone, messageType: 'weekly_business_summary_sent', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/analytics/log-intent → PostHog. Privacy-safe: orgId + event type only. Reads org/phone from Split node (last 1:1 node) since Send response strips them.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Set this workflow as its own Error Workflow in Settings > Error Workflow.

nodes.name: Log Error

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'n8n_weekly_business_summary', error: $json.error?.message, workflow: $json.workflow?.name, node: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted, executionId: $json.execution?.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: Logs failures to Sentry via /api/errors/log. Never messages a customer chat.
